entries.title: HackIndore 3.0 Organizer
entries.description: Secured three sponsorships by pitching to education companies and food brands, while leading the creation of promotional materials and outreach content. Managed on-ground operations for 150+ participants, coordinating logistics for 30 finalist teams and ensuring smooth communication throughout the event. Contributed to the execution of a large-scale hackathon with 300+ teams, supporting evaluation processes, assisting in final winner selection, and developing promotional and engagement content.
